disclaimer: Completeness findings and cited evidence only; this is not a lending decision or package certification, and no loan action has been taken. Human review and certification are required before the package proceeds.
narrative: This completeness assessment reviewed the closing package for loan LN-2026-88213 (US-CA, conventional-30yr-purchase) as of 2026-07-15 against the product and jurisdiction checklist (checklist-conv-purchase-2026.06). It identified 2 blocker(s), 2 exception(s), and 2 advisory item(s). Blockers: the required income_verification document is not present, and the appraisal on file (D-2) is past its 120-day validity window. Exceptions: the borrower name on the CA state disclosure (D-6) does not match the note, and prior-to-funding condition PTC-2 remains outstanding. The package is not ready for human certification until the blocker items are resolved; each item is listed for the certifier with its cited source. Completeness findings and cited evidence only; this is not a lending decision or package certification, and no loan action has been taken. Human review and certification are required before the package proceeds.
